w:r.w:t: HGH Payroll — Hoggar Global Holdings Payroll System
Hobort Shipping & Logistics | Hobort Auto Parts Express

HGH Payroll is a bespoke, multi-tenant payroll management system built exclusively for Hoggar Global Holdings and its subsidiary businesses. It replaces manual payroll workflows across all HGH companies with a unified, Ghana tax-compliant digital platform — branded under HGH identity, deployable on Vercel, and accessible from any device.

Currently, payroll across HGH businesses (Hobort Shipping & Logistics, Hobort Auto Parts Express, and future subsidiaries) is managed manually, creating risk of errors, inconsistency in Ghana SSNIT and PAYE compliance, no audit trail, and no central visibility for the business owner. A purpose-built system is required.
Centralize payroll for all HGH subsidiary companies under one platform
Automate Ghana-specific tax calculations: SSNIT (Employee 5.5%, Employer 13%), PAYE tiered tax
Generate branded, professional payslips in PDF format
Provide employee self-service portal to access their own payslips
Enforce approval workflows and maintain an immutable audit trail
Support leave management, loans, and advance salary deductions
Deliver a branded, polished UI — no generic off-the-shelf aesthetics
This system will NOT integrate with third-party accounting software in V1
This system will NOT handle payroll outside of Ghana in V1
This system will NOT replace HR onboarding or performance management tools
Branded HGH tokens, no default UI
No native alerts, slide-in branded toasts
The entire UI must be built from the HGH brand token system. No default Tailwind colors, no shadcn defaults, no native browser UI elements. Every component must feel like it belongs to HGH.

Use Google Material Symbols (Outlined variant) exclusively throughout the application. Import via Google Fonts CDN. No emoji, no PNG icons, no SVG-heavy icon libraries. All icons must use the HGH color tokens, not hardcoded colors. Size: 20px default, 24px for primary actions.

All system feedback — success, error, warning, and informational — must be delivered via the custom HGH Toast system. Zero native browser alerts, confirm() dialogs, or popup modals for feedback. The toast system must behave as follows:
Slide in from the bottom-right corner with a smooth spring animation (like TikTok notifications)
Auto-dismiss after 4 seconds with a shrinking progress bar at the bottom of the toast
Stacks vertically when multiple toasts are active; oldest dismisses first
Swipe-right or click X to manually dismiss
Four variants: success (teal), error (red), warning (gold), info (navy)
Each variant has a corresponding Google Material Icon prefix: check_circle, error, warning, info
Toast background uses semi-transparent frosted glass effect (backdrop-blur) over HGH navy
Toast text is always white; icon matches the variant accent color
Toasts are accessible: ARIA role="alert", screen reader announced
Implementation: build a ToastProvider at the root layout, expose a useToast() hook that any component can call. Example usage:
toast.success('Payroll approved for Hobort Shipping & Logistics')
toast.error('PAYE calculation failed — check employee GH-0012')

The system is architected as a multi-tenant platform where a single HGH Super Admin can manage all subsidiary companies from one login. Each company is a fully isolated entity with its own employees, payroll runs, and settings.
Company entity model: name, logo, registration number, address, base currency (GHS)
Company switcher in the sidebar — shows company logo and name with a dropdown to switch
All data queries are scoped by companyId — no cross-company data leaks
Super Admin can create, edit, archive companies
Pre-loaded: Hobort Shipping & Logistics, Hobort Auto Parts Express
Company-level settings: SSNIT tier overrides, allowance templates, leave policies

Employee profiles: full name, employee ID (auto-generated, e.g. HSL-0042), department, job title, employment type (full-time, part-time, contractor), start date, status (active / suspended / terminated)
Salary structure per employee: basic salary, allowances (housing, transport, other), recurring deductions
Bank account details (encrypted at rest): bank name, account number, branch
SSNIT number and TIN number fields (required for tax compliance)
Upload employee documents (ID, contract — stored in Vercel Blob)
Soft delete only — employee records are never permanently deleted (legal compliance)
Bulk import employees via CSV upload with validation
The payroll engine must implement Ghana Revenue Authority (GRA) rules precisely. All logic lives in lib/ghana-tax.ts and is unit-tested.
Optional per employee or company-wide default
Gross Pay minus SSNIT Employee contribution
Applied to Taxable Pay per GRA monthly bands
Taxable Pay minus PAYE minus other deductions
Support for custom allowances (transport, housing, overtime — configurable per company)
Support for custom one-time deductions (salary advance recovery, loan repayment, fines)
Prorated salary for partial-month starters and leavers
Unpaid leave deduction: automatically deducted from gross before tax
GRA PAYE bracket table must be editable by Super Admin (for annual GRA updates)
Payroll must follow a structured approval workflow to prevent errors. No payrun can be finalized without approval.
Step 1 — Draft: HR creates a payrun for a company and pay period. System calculates all employees.
Step 2 — Review: HR reviews calculations, can override individual employee figures with a reason note
Step 3 — Submit for Approval: HR submits the payrun to the Company Admin or Super Admin
Step 4 — Approve or Reject: Admin approves (locks the payrun) or rejects with a comment
Step 5 — Finalized: Approved payruns are immutable. Payslips are generated and optionally emailed
Payrun status badges: Draft / Pending Approval / Approved / Rejected
Each payrun stores a snapshot of all employee salaries at the time — historical changes do not affect past runs
Auto-generate PDF payslips on payrun approval
Payslip layout mirrors the HGH-branded template (based on Biz360 reference, redesigned in HGH brand)
Payslip includes: company name/logo, employee name & ID, pay period, earnings breakdown, deductions breakdown, SSNIT employer contribution (informational), gross, taxable, net
Bulk download: ZIP of all payslips for a payrun
Email delivery: send payslip PDF to employee email address with branded email template
Payslips are stored in Vercel Blob and linked to the employee record permanently
Employees get their own login to a read-only portal. They cannot see any other employees data.
View personal profile (name, ID, department, salary structure — no bank details shown)
Download all historical payslips in PDF
View leave balance and leave history
View loan/advance balance and repayment schedule
Dashboard shows: last payslip summary, YTD earnings, leave days remaining
Mobile-responsive — designed mobile-first for employees on phones
Leave types per company: Annual, Sick, Maternity, Paternity, Compassionate, Unpaid
Leave entitlement configuration per company and per employee
Employee submits leave request with date range, type, and optional note
HR/Admin approves or rejects leave requests
Approved unpaid leave automatically creates a deduction rule for the next payrun
Leave balance tracker: entitlement minus used, prorated by start date
Leave calendar view for HR to see team availability
HR creates a loan or salary advance record for an employee: amount, disbursement date, repayment plan (monthly installments)
System auto-creates recurring deduction entries on each payrun
Dashboard shows: outstanding balance, repayment progress bar, expected completion date
Employee can view own loan status in the self-service portal
Loan is automatically closed when balance reaches zero
Multiple active loans per employee are supported
Total monthly payroll cost across all HGH companies (combined and per company)
Payroll cost as % of revenue (manual revenue input per company)
Monthly payroll summary: all employees, earnings, deductions, net — export to Excel/CSV
SSNIT contribution report (format compatible with SSNIT online portal)
PAYE tax summary report (for GRA filing)
Year-to-date P9A report per employee (annual tax certificate)
Headcount report by department and company
Full access across all HGH companies. Create/archive companies, manage all users, edit GRA tax brackets, view all reports, approve any payrun
Full access within their assigned company only. Cannot see other companies data. Can approve/reject payruns for their company
Manage employees, create payrun drafts, submit for approval, manage leave and loans. Cannot approve their own submissions
Read-only self-service portal only. Cannot see any other employee. Cannot access any admin area
Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) mandatory for Super Admin and Company Admin roles
MFA recommended (prompted but not forced) for HR Manager
Session timeout: 30 minutes of inactivity for admin roles, 60 minutes for employees
JWT tokens with short expiry (15 min), refresh token rotation
Clerk handles all auth flows: login, registration, MFA, password reset, social login disabled
Brute-force protection: account locked after 5 failed login attempts for 30 minutes
All data transmitted over HTTPS only (enforced by Vercel)
Sensitive fields encrypted at rest using AES-256: bank account numbers, SSNIT numbers, TIN numbers, salary figures
Row-Level Security (RLS) enforced at the database layer via Prisma middleware — all queries automatically scoped to companyId and userId
Vercel Blob storage for documents: private, signed URLs only (expire after 1 hour), never publicly accessible
Environment variables for all secrets via Vercel — never commit secrets to code
Input sanitization on all form fields — Zod schema validation on both client and server
SQL injection prevention via Prisma parameterized queries
Every state-changing action is logged to an immutable audit_logs table: actor (userId), action type, entity affected, before/after values, timestamp, IP address
Payrun records are immutable once approved — any attempt to modify is rejected at API layer
Audit logs are never deletable, even by Super Admin
Audit log viewer in Super Admin panel: filter by user, company, date range, action type
Salary change history: every change to an employee salary structure logs the old and new values with who changed it and when
Rate limiting on all API routes via Upstash Redis: 100 req/min per IP for public routes, 500 req/min for authenticated routes
Neon database: connection pooling via PgBouncer, no direct internet access, VPC-isolated
Automated daily database backups with 30-day retention (Neon built-in)
Dependency scanning via Dependabot on the GitHub repository
CSP headers, X-Frame-Options, and HSTS enforced in Next.js middleware
Key entities and their relationships. Full Prisma schema to be generated from this definition.
id, name, logo, registrationNumber, address, isActive, createdAt
id, clerkId, email, name, role (SUPER_ADMIN | COMPANY_ADMIN | HR | EMPLOYEE), companyId, isActive
id, employeeCode, userId, companyId, department, jobTitle, employmentType, startDate, status, basicSalary, ssnit, tin, bankAccountEncrypted
id, employeeId, type (ALLOWANCE | DEDUCTION), name, amount, isRecurring, startDate, endDate
id, companyId, periodStart, periodEnd, status (DRAFT | PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED), createdBy, approvedBy, approvedAt, lockedAt
id, payrunId, employeeId, grossPay, ssnit Employee, ssnitEmployer, taxablePay, payeTax, totalDeductions, netPay, salarySnapshot (JSON)
id, payrunLineId, employeeId, pdfUrl, emailedAt, downloadCount
id, employeeId, type, startDate, endDate, days, status (PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED), approvedBy, note
id, employeeId, type (LOAN | ADVANCE), amount, disbursedAt, monthlyRepayment, balance, status (ACTIVE | COMPLETED)
id, actorId, action, entityType, entityId, beforeState (JSON), afterState (JSON), ipAddress, createdAt
id, year, minAmount, maxAmount, rate, isActive — editable by Super Admin for annual GRA updates
Initialize Next.js 14 project with TypeScript, Tailwind, and App Router
Set up HGH design token system in tailwind.config.ts — define all brand colors as CSS custom properties
Install and configure Clerk for authentication with RBAC roles
Set up Prisma + Neon PostgreSQL, run initial migrations
Build the TikTok-style Toast system (ToastProvider, useToast hook, 4 variants, animations)
Build HGH Design System components: Button, Input, Badge, Card, Modal, Dropdown, Sidebar, DataTable — all branded, no defaults
Build core layout: HGH-branded sidebar with company switcher, header with user menu
Build Employee CRUD with CSV bulk import
Build ghana-tax.ts calculation engine with full unit tests
Build Payrun creation, calculation preview, and approval workflow
Build payslip PDF generator using @react-pdf/renderer with HGH branding
Payslip email delivery via Resend with branded HTML email template
Build Leave management module (types, requests, approvals, calendar)
Build Loan & Advance tracker with auto-deduction
Build Employee Self-Service portal (separate layout, mobile-first)
Build GRA Tax Bracket editor (Super Admin)
Build dashboard analytics with Recharts (payroll cost, headcount, SSNIT liability)
Build all export reports: monthly summary, SSNIT, PAYE, P9A, loan balance
Rate limiting via Upstash Redis on all API routes
Security headers in Next.js middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options)
End-to-end testing with Playwright for critical payroll workflows
Vercel deployment with preview branches per feature
The following rules must be followed throughout the Cursor build session:
NEVER use native browser alert(), confirm(), or prompt() — always use the custom Toast system
NEVER use emoji in the UI — use Google Material Icons (Symbols, Outlined) exclusively
NEVER apply Tailwind default color classes (blue-500, green-400, etc.) — use only HGH tokens (e.g. text-hgh-navy, bg-hgh-gold)
NEVER use shadcn default styles — always extend with HGH brand overrides in component variants
ALL form validation must use Zod schemas — no ad-hoc validation
ALL API routes must verify session and role via Clerk middleware before any DB call
ALL salary and tax calculations must go through ghana-tax.ts — no inline math in components
ALL state-changing API calls must write to the AuditLog table
EVERY payrun mutation must check payrun.lockedAt — reject any mutation if locked
EVERY database query must be scoped by companyId from the session context

Given an employee with basic salary GHS 5,000: system must produce SSNIT Employee = GHS 275, SSNIT Employer = GHS 650, Taxable Pay = GHS 4,725, PAYE = per GRA bracket, Net Pay = Taxable minus PAYE minus other deductions
Matches the reference payslip from Biz360 for Hobort Shipping & Logistics
Unit tests for ghana-tax.ts must pass 100% with at least 15 test cases covering edge cases
All screens must render with HGH brand colors — a design review by the owner must pass before launch
No native browser UI alerts in any user flow
All Google Material Icons must render at correct sizes, not blurry or broken
Toast notifications must appear within 200ms of the triggering action
Mobile responsive: all employee self-service screens must work on 375px viewport
Employee role cannot access any URL under /dashboard/employees, /dashboard/payroll, or /dashboard/companies
Company Admin cannot see or query data belonging to another company (verified by API tests)
Approved payrun record cannot be modified via any API call
MFA enforcement test: Super Admin login without MFA must be blocked
Payrun calculation for 50 employees must complete in under 2 seconds
PDF generation for a single payslip must complete in under 3 seconds
Dashboard page load (Largest Contentful Paint) must be under 2.5 seconds on 4G
